As the product name states, the resin that we create from dried, cured material is labeled as “Cured Resin”. The majority of what we process in our lab is fresh frozen material and that creates a “Live Resin”. There is nothing wrong with consuming one resin over the other and we ensure that the odor of terpenes overwhelm your senses regardless of which resin you choose. Live Resin tends to have more terpene value over the cured resin, but that depends on the strain, the way it was grown, and the way that it was harvested. There are many variables that can affect terpene, THC, and total cannabinoid levels.

As the product name states, the resin that we create from dried, cured material is labeled as “Cured Resin”. The majority of what we process in our lab is fresh frozen material and that creates a “Live Resin”. There is nothing wrong with consuming one resin over the other and we ensure that the odor of terpenes overwhelm your senses regardless of which resin you choose. Live Resin tends to have more terpene value over the cured resin, but that depends on the strain, the way it was grown, and the way that it was harvested. There are many variables that can affect terpene, THC, and total cannabinoid levels.
